channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Google releases Gemma 4 under Apache 2.0 — and that license change may matter more than benchmarks
item.description: For the past two years, enterprises evaluating open-weight models have faced an awkward trade-off. Google's Gemma line consistently delivered strong performance, but its custom license — with usage restrictions and terms Google could update at will — pushed many teams toward Mistral or Alibaba's Qwen instead. Legal review added friction. Compliance teams flagged edge cases. And capable as Gemma 3 was, "open" with asterisks isn't the same as open.Gemma 4 eliminates that friction entirely. Google DeepMind's newest open model family ships under a standard Apache 2.0 license — the same permissive ...

item.title: I found the best Geekom mini PC deals in the Easter sale — save big on some of our highest rated and reviewed mini PCs if you're quick
item.description: I've found big savings on Geekom's mini PCs, discounted for Easter — but hurry, the sale ends soon.

item.title: U.S. Considers Ban on Chinese Air Bags Blamed for Deaths of 10 People in Survivable Crashes
item.description: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy said, "these substandard parts are killing American families."

item.title: Apple AirPods Pro 3, Forza Horizon 6 et MacBook Air M5 : les meilleures promos du jeudi 2 avril 2026 à saisir
item.description: Ce jeudi 2 avril 2026, les bons plans ne manquent pas pour celles et ceux qui aiment la tech et les jeux vidéo.

item.title: OpenAI just bought TBPN
item.description: OpenAI has purchased TBPN, the viral online talk show that often interviews AI executives and other tech leaders. The show - which goes live every weekday, often for a three-hour duration - considers channels like Bloomberg and CNBC as its competition and counts OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, as well as executives from Meta, Microsoft, Palantir, […]

item.title: Dell just made its thinnest Pro Premium executive laptop yet — a magnesium alloy featherweight that finally makes carrying a workstation feel effortless
item.description: Dell’s 14-inch Pro Premium combines a lightweight magnesium chassis, optimized motherboard, AI-capable processors, and high-quality display for executive mobility.

item.title: Verge subscribers: Join us for a movie night in New York City, hosted by The Vergecast
item.description: The Vergecast is hosting a special in-person screening of Sneakers in partnership with IFC in New York City, and we're opening presale tickets exclusively to Verge subscribers. Sneakers is a movie about what happens when technology becomes more powerful than our ability to control it. It's about privacy and hacking and who the "good guys" […]

item.title: How American independent bookstores made a massive comeback
item.description: Amazon once seemed poised to wipe out the American bookstore. As online shopping exploded in the late 1990s and early 2000s, independent shops struggled to compete with endless inventory and lower prices. By 2009, many believed indie bookstores were on the brink of extinction. But instead of disappearing, they adapted. The future of books, it […] Amazon once seemed poised to wipe out the American bookstore. As online shopping exploded in the late 1990s and early 2000s, independent shops struggled to compete with endless inventory and lower prices. By 2009, many believed indie bookstores were o...

item.title: « C’est un cancer » : pourquoi ce sénateur américain veut-il à tout prix interdire les voitures chinoises aux États-Unis
item.description: Les voitures électriques chinoises sont moins chères, souvent mieux équipées et technologiquement compétitives. Les Américains commencent à s'y intéresser sérieusement. Et c'est justement là que ça coince.

item.title: Samsung’s New Frame TVs Look Even More Like Actual Paintings
item.description: Best of all, the 2026 "art" TVs come in cheaper 55-inch sizes.

item.title: Indie Pass is a forthcoming subscription service exclusively for indie games
item.description:
Publisher and game management platform indie.io just announced the pending launch of something called Indie Pass. This is a subscription service, so it's sort of like Game Pass but for indie titles. It launches on April 13 and will offer over 70 games on that date, with more coming down the line. Not a single person on this planet wants another monthly subscription to manage, but this one costs just $8. That's a pretty good deal, considering Game Pass Ultimate costs a whopping $30 per month.
However, these subscription platforms are only as good as their libraries. The company has already con...

item.title: « Une société vitale pour le pays » : c’est quoi cette entreprise française d’IA et de minage que Xavier Niel a sauvée
item.description: Au cœur d'une bataille stratégique silencieuse, Xavier Niel a été appelé à la rescousse par l'Élysée pour protéger Exaion, une ancienne filiale d'EDF spécialisée dans l'intelligence artificielle et le minage de cryptomonnaies. Plongée dans les coulisses d'un montage pour comprendre comment le patron de Free a réussi à sauver une entreprise jugée d'importance vitale pour le pays. ...

item.title: You Can Now Watch Rocky From ‘Project Hail Mary’ Sleep With the Perfect Accompaniment
item.description: Daniel Pemberton's score has been uploaded to YouTube alongside video of Rocky sleeping, and we love it.

item.title: Cursor Launches a New AI Agent Experience to Take On Claude Code and Codex
item.description: As Cursor launches the next generation of its product, the AI coding startup has to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic more directly than ever.

item.title: Amazon is giving away one of the best strategy games ever, plus loads of other PC games for Prime members
item.description: Amazon is giving Prime Members the chance to claim loads of amazing strategy games this month.

item.title: Your next iPhone case could be made from lab-grown T-Rex leather thanks to ‘world first’ technology — but experts say otherwise
item.description: VML is unveiling the world's first T-Rex leather product in Amsterdam, marking the beginning of a manufacturing revolution.

item.title: 5 Things You May Have Missed During NASA’s Historic Launch of Artemis 2
item.description: Four astronauts blasted off on a journey to the Moon on Wednesday. Here are some cool launch-day details you may not have picked up on.

item.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models
item.description: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.

item.title: Nouvelle norme de sécurité GB 47372-2026 : un énorme impact sur les batteries externes
item.description: Regardez votre batterie externe actuelle. Est-elle vraiment sûre ? Pour mettre fin aux explosions à répétition, le gouvernement chinois, épaulé par des géants comme Xiaomi et Huawei, vient de publier une norme de sécurité obligatoire.

item.title: L’abonnement Google AI Pro s’est amélioré sans augmentation de prix
item.description: Google vient d'augmenter la valeur de son forfait AI Pro en passant le stockage à 5 To, au lieu de 2 To.

item.title: I’ve been testing film cameras for years, and the Lomography Lomo MC-A easily just became my favorite
item.description: A solid metal build, capable autofocus and manual settings control make this premium compact the new film camera to beat.

item.title: Russia closes loophole to fully block payments for Apple services
item.description: Russia has closed a loophole that allowed its citizens to pay for Apple digital services. "As of April 1, 2026, payment processing is no longer available for purchases made on the App Store or other Apple Media Services in Russia," the company wrote in a support document (via 9to5Mac).The change affects all Apple services. However, the company says iCloud+ subscribers' data will remain available after their subscriptions end, even after losing premium cloud storage. Customers' previous purchases will still be accessible, as will existing Apple Account funds until they run out.Why is Russia doi...

item.title: Hisense’s art-inspired CanvasTV has hit a new low price
item.description: Samsung’s releasing a new version of The Frame sometime this year, though the exact date is still unknown and, based on past models, it’s likely to be pricey. If you’d rather not wait or want to save some cash, the 55-inch Hisense CanvasTV has hit a new low price of $599.99 ($400 off) at Amazon, […]

item.title: Le forfait idéal pour les globe-trotters coûte 16 € /mois : 250 Go de 5G et 40 Go dans 110 pays
item.description: Avis aux voyageurs qui souhaitent une enveloppe de données 5G généreuse en France, mais aussi à l'étranger : B&You propose actuellement un forfait 5G de 250 Go, avec 40 Go utilisables dans plus de 110 destinations, à 15,99 euros par mois.

item.title: Money transfer app Duc exposed thousands of driver’s licenses and passports to the open web
item.description: An exposed Amazon-hosted server allowed anyone to access reams of customer data without needing a password.

item.title: How to watch The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist in theaters – and can you stream it online yet?
item.description: The definitive AI documentary is now in theatres and is expected to stream in 2026. Here’s how you can currently watch The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist ahead of its streaming launch.

item.title: 'This rootkit is highly persistent; a standard factory reset will not remove it': "NoVoice" Android malware on Google Play infects 50 apps across 2.3 million devices, here's what we know
item.description: NoVoice can clone people's WhatsApp accounts on different devices, experts warn.

item.title: NymVPN's Mac app gets the split tunneling feature users have been waiting for
item.description: NymVPN v2026.6 introduces split tunneling for macOS in beta, plus better authentication, easier app-to-web login, and a new alpha testing program.

item.title: 30 Unpublished Poems From Iconic Greek Philosopher Discovered in Cairo
item.description: For over two millennia, the philosopher’s poetic work had largely been alluded to in the writings of others.

item.title: Cette carte bancaire 100% française alternative à Visa et Mastercard propose une vraie innovation
item.description: Une carte bancaire aussi sécurisée que le paiement par smartphone, et sur un réseau 100% français. C'est la promesse de l'innovation présentée par Thales Group.

item.title: Le dilemme du patron américain de Mercedes : accélérer sur l’électrique ou faire revivre le thermique au risque de se faire dépasser par la Chine
item.description: Face au coup de frein du marché électrique américain, Mercedes-Benz joue les équilibristes. Si le constructeur conserve des plateformes flexibles capables d'accueillir des motorisations à combustion pour ne pas brusquer les clients outre-Atlantique, il l'avoue : à l'échelle mondiale, il n'a "pas le choix". Récit du patron américain de Mercedes-Benz USA. ...

item.title: Flipboard just launched Surf, its new social app and feed reader
item.description: Surf is a slightly hard app to explain. It's sort of three things: a client for fediverse apps like Bluesky and Mastodon; a feed reader that lets you subscribe to almost any website, podcast, or YouTube channel; and a tool for creating and following feeds of interesting content, a la Flipboard magazines. It's a browser […]

item.title: Lucid Recalls 4,000 Gravity SUVs for Faulty Seat Belts That May Not Actually Work During a Collision
item.description: The recall affects Gravity models made between December 2024 and February 2026.

item.title: The Last of Us Online director reveals Naughty Dog had to choose between canceling the '80%' completed game and Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet — 'It was soul crushing. To find out that it was getting canceled 24 hours before it was announced' publicly
item.description: The director of Naughty Dog's The Last of Us Online has revealed that the multiplayer spin-off was almost finished before it was canceled.

item.title: The ‘Handmaid’s Tale’ Sequel Is a Beautifully Executed Dystopian Nightmare
item.description: ‘The Testaments’ returns to Gilead in Hulu’s continuation of Margaret Atwood’s story; it stars Ann Dowd and Chase Infiniti and premieres April 8.

item.title: Anthropic Says That Claude Contains Its Own Kind of Emotions
item.description: Researchers at the company found representations inside of Claude that perform functions similar to human feelings.

item.title: Google now lets you direct avatars through prompts in its Vids app
item.description: Google is adding a way to customize and instruct avatars for video creation in the Vids app.

item.title: The Testaments review: praise be, the Hulu Handmaid's Tale spinoff doesn't disappoint under his eye
item.description: After the rocky Handmaid's Tale season 6 finale, The Testaments on Hulu and Disney+ is just the beginning of something even bigger, better, and bolder.

item.title: Google releases Gemma 4, a family of open models built off of Gemini 3
item.description: When Google released Gemini 3 Pro at the end of last year, it was a significant step forward for the company's proprietary large language models. Now, the company is bringing some of the same technology and research that made those models possible to the open source community with the release of its new family of Gemma 4 open-weight models.Google is offering four different versions of Gemma 4, differentiated by the number of parameters on offer. For edge devices, including smartphones, the company has the 2-billion and 4-billion "Effective" models. For more powerful machines, there’s the 26-bi...

item.title: OpenAI’s gigantic new funding round renews fears about the company’s profitability and cash burn
item.description: The stakes of Big AI’s bet that it will transform business and personal life seem to be growing by leaps and bounds. Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. I’m Mark Sullivan, a senior writer at Fast Company, covering emerging tech, AI, and tech policy.

item.title: J’ai testé la direction électronique de la Mercedes EQS : conduire sans colonne de direction en steer-by-wire, ça fait quoi ?
item.description: Fini le lien physique entre vos mains et les roues. Avec sa future berline électrique EQS, Mercedes introduit une direction 100 % électronique dépourvue de colonne mécanique, associée à un volant au design… déroutant. Une option facturée près de 2 500 € qui filtre la route et bouleverse les repères traditionnels. Gadget marketing ou véritable révolution de la conduite ? Nous avons pris la route pour en avoir le cœur net. ...

item.title: Even Artemis II Astronauts Have Microsoft Outlook Problems
item.description: The mission commander’s email inbox failed during the journey to the moon. Have they tried turning the computer off and back on again?

item.title: Amazon is slashing prices on best-selling running shoes for spring — Nike, Hoka, and New Balance from $55
item.description: Amazon has a huge sale on best-selling running shoes for spring, and I've rounded up the top-rated deals from Nike, Hoka, New Balance, and more.

item.title: Sur la banquise du Groenland, cet avion français réussit ce que les appareils américains ne font qu’avec des skis
item.description: L'Armée de l'Air et de l'Espace vient de réaliser une véritable prouesse technique dans le Grand Nord. Un avion de transport militaire A400M Atlas s'est posé pour la toute première fois sur une piste naturelle de glace au Groenland. Cette manœuvre inédite réalisée sans équipement spécial prouve la supériorité de l'appareil européen face à ses concurrents américains dans les milieux extrêmes....
